name: Inside Out Ravioli (Bkkp14b)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spinach according to package directions; drain and reserve liquid.
2. Add water to make 1 cup; set aside.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon oil on medium high heat.
4. Saute beef, onions, and garlic until lightly browned.
5. Add reserved spinach liquid, spaghetti sauce, tomato sauce, salt, and pepper; simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
7. Combine spinach, macaroni, cheese, bread crumbs, eggs, and oil in a bowl.
8. Pour the mixture into a greased 13 x 9 x 2 inch baking dish (or two smaller round dishes for freezing one).
9. Top with meat sauce.
10. Bake for 30 minutes. Yield: 10-12 servings. Freezes well. One of my kids has an aversion to anything green, but he still likes this! Paula in IL
